title: Pomaderris nitidula
taxonomy: Pomaderris nitidula is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to Australia, where it is commonly found in various habitats. The genus Pomaderris is a group of shrubs and small trees that are native to Australia and New Zealand. Pomaderris nitidula is one of the many species within this genus, and it is known for its distinctive leaves and flowers. The classification of Pomaderris nitidula is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Rosales, Family: Rhamnaceae, Genus: Pomaderris, Species: P. nitidula.
